metadata.scope: fixed-nf MSbar alpha_s 4-loop running plus RunDec c(x) 4-loop mass running for c: nf=4 mc->3 GeV and b: nf=5 mb->10 GeV; no threshold crossing

sources.citation: Chetyrkin, Kühn, Steinhauser, RunDec: a Mathematica package for running and decoupling of the strong coupling and quark masses, Comput. Phys. Commun. 133 (2000), arXiv:hep-ph/0004189
Herren and Steinhauser, Version 3 of RunDec and CRunDec, Comput. Phys. Commun. 224 (2018), arXiv:1703.03751
van Ritbergen, Vermaseren, Larin, The four-loop beta function in quantum chromodynamics, Phys. Lett. B 400 (1997)

beta_alpha_s_mu.convention: d alpha_s / d ln(mu) = - beta0 alpha_s^2/(2*pi) - beta1 alpha_s^3/(8*pi^2) - beta2 alpha_s^4/(32*pi^3) - beta3 alpha_s^5/(128*pi^4)

mass_c_function_alpha_over_pi.convention: m(mu)/m(mu0)=c_nf(alpha_s(mu)/pi)/c_nf(alpha_s(mu0)/pi); fixed nf; coefficients are RunDec c(x) numerical series through x^3
